# Ev Charging Session

> Records the full lifecycle of an EV charging session — opening on plug-in, appending per-reading telemetry throughout, and aggregating energy, duration, cost, and battery change on close.

**Category:** Asset · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ev · charging · energy · kWh · telemetry · cost · vehicle

## What this does

Records the full lifecycle of an EV charging session — opening on plug-in, appending per-reading telemetry throughout, and aggregating energy, duration, cost, and battery change on close.

Specifies 3 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **session_id** *(hidden, optional)* — Session ID
- **vehicle_id** *(text, required)* — Vehicle ID
- **start_date** *(datetime, required)* — Start Date
- **end_date** *(datetime, optional)* — End Date
- **duration_min** *(number, optional)* — Duration (minutes)
- **start_battery_level** *(number, required)* — Start Battery Level (%)
- **end_battery_level** *(number, optional)* — End Battery Level (%)
- **start_range_km** *(number, optional)* — Start Range (km)
- **end_range_km** *(number, optional)* — End Range (km)
- **charge_energy_added_kwh** *(number, optional)* — Energy Added (kWh)
- **charge_energy_used_kwh** *(number, optional)* — Grid Energy Used (kWh)
- **outside_temp_avg** *(number, optional)* — Avg Outside Temp (°C)
- **cost** *(number, optional)* — Session Cost
- **location_id** *(hidden, optional)* — Location (Geofence)
- **reading_date** *(datetime, required)* — Reading Timestamp
- **battery_level** *(number, required)* — Battery Level at Reading (%)
- **charger_power_kw** *(number, optional)* — Charger Power (kW)
- **charger_voltage** *(number, optional)* — Charger Voltage (V)
- **charger_actual_current** *(number, optional)* — Charger Current (A)
- **charger_phases** *(number, optional)* — AC Phases
- **fast_charger_type** *(text, optional)* — Charger Network / Protocol

## What must be true

- **session_opens_on_charging_state:** A charging session opens when the vehicle API reports charging_state as Starting or Charging
- **telemetry_every_five_seconds:** Per-reading telemetry is appended approximately every 5 seconds during the session, creating a detailed time series of the charging curve
- **aggregates_on_close:** When a session closes — charge_energy_added = last minus first reading; charge_energy_used = sum(voltage x current x phases x interval seconds / 3600); duration_min = (max_date - min_date) in minutes; outside_temp_avg = average of all readings
- **cost_from_geofence_tariff:** Cost is calculated based on the geofence tariff at the charging location. If no tariff is configured cost is null
- **free_charging_exemption:** If the vehicle holds a free-charging entitlement and the session used the qualifying network, cost is set to 0.00 regardless of tariff
- **location_from_nearest_geofence:** Location is determined at session start by finding the nearest geofence containing the vehicle's position
- **sessions_never_deleted:** Sessions are never deleted after completion — they serve as the source of truth for efficiency factor derivation and battery health analysis

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Session Started** — when no charging session is currently in progress for this vehicle; charging_state in ["Starting","Charging"], then Charging session opened; telemetry collection begins.
- **Telemetry Reading Recorded** — when a charging session is in_progress, then One telemetry reading appended; charging curve grows.
- **Session Completed** — when a charging session is in_progress; charging_state not_in ["Starting","Charging"], then Session aggregated and closed; efficiency recalculation triggered.

## Errors it can return

- `CHARGING_SESSION_NO_DATA` — Charging session ended without sufficient telemetry data.

## Connects to

- **vehicle-state-machine** *(required)*
- **ev-charging-cost-tariff** *(required)*
- **geofence-places** *(recommended)*
- **trip-energy-consumption** *(recommended)*
- **battery-health-tracking** *(recommended)*
